3225380.name: Pinball FX - Williams™ Pinball Volume 8
3225380.description:
Dive into 3 tables of Williams retro goodness of some of the most action-packed tables ever created! Black Knight™ 2000, Banzai Run™ and Earthshaker!™ take you back to the arcades of the 80s for hours of silver ball fun.

In this pack:

Black Knight™ 2000: He rides again! Prepare yourself for a colorful and musical extravaganza as you use your flippers to defeat the iconic Black Knight. You've got the power, you've got the might!

Banzai Run™: Be the King of the Hill! Embark on a unique two-playfield pinball experience with this one-of-a-kind Williams classic! Get first place and beat all other racers to climb Banzai Hill and the leaderboards!

Earthshaker!™: In the seismic world of Earthshaker, the earth quakes hard and your machine with it! Shake up your play on this 1989 Williams masterpiece.
3225380.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言
